hero.name: Mohammad El Prince
hero.tagline: Software engineer with a data background who builds and ships production systems on AWS — 15+ serverless applications and a multi-region web platform serving operations teams at Amazon fulfillment centers.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who I am
body: I'm a software engineer with a data background who builds and ships production systems on AWS. At Amazon I designed and deployed 15+ serverless applications and a multi-region web platform serving operations teams across North American fulfillment centers.

I'm strong in TypeScript, Python, and cloud infrastructure, with a bias for ownership and delivering end-to-end — from requirements and architecture through infrastructure-as-code, CI/CD, and production monitoring.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.body: Have a project, role, or idea in mind? I'm always open to interesting conversations.
